name: Hassan Al-Balawi
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم حسن! 👋 أتمنى أن تكون بخير. لاحظت أنك حصلت على 19/100 في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسن درجاتك قبل الاختبار القادم بعد 6 أيام. هل تريد أن نركز على المواضيع الصعبة معاً؟ 💪
action: Call Hassan today to introduce yourself, understand his learning challenges, and schedule a focused tutoring session covering the weak areas identified in his quiz performance before the next assessment in 6 days.
reasoning: Hassan has never been contacted despite critical quiz failure (19/100) and is on a remedial track, representing an extreme intervention gap. With only 6 days until the next quiz and perfect attendance showing engagement potential, immediate personal outreach is essential to prevent further failure and academic disengagement.
